---
title: "Terms of Service"
description: "Terms governing the use of the StudyStats website and consulting services."
pagetitle: "Terms of Service — StudyStats"
format: html
---

*Last updated: May 2026*

By using **study-stats.com** or engaging StudyStats for consulting services,
you agree to the following terms.

## Services

StudyStats provides biostatistics and research-methodology consulting. Specific
deliverables, timelines and fees are agreed in writing for each engagement
(quote, email or contract).

## Fees and payment

- Quotes are valid for 30 days.
- A 50% deposit secures the start of a project; the balance is due on delivery.
- Hourly work is billed in 30-minute increments at the published rate.
- All prices are in South African Rand (ZAR) and exclude VAT unless stated.

## Scope and revisions

Each package includes a defined number of revision rounds (specified at
quotation). Additional revisions are billed at the hourly rate.

## Confidentiality

We treat all client data, protocols and unpublished results as confidential. A
formal NDA can be signed on request.

## Authorship and acknowledgement

StudyStats provides statistical support; authorship of resulting manuscripts
follows ICMJE criteria and remains the client's responsibility. Acknowledgement
of statistical support in publications is appreciated but optional.

## Limitation of liability

Statistical advice is provided in good faith based on the data and information
supplied by the client. StudyStats is not liable for decisions made on the
basis of incomplete or inaccurate inputs, nor for indirect or consequential
losses.

## Governing law

These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of South Africa.

## Contact

[studystatsbb@gmail.com](mailto:studystatsbb@gmail.com)
